category_sources: source_facts.description says it is an abstract soundfile decoder for SDL; official SDL_sound page describes decoding popular sound formats such as WAV and MP3.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is sdl2_sound; official website and GitHub README use SDL_sound.
docs_sources: Official website is linked from the GitHub README as the most up-to-date information source; official GitHub README documents formats, build/install, and bug reporting.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/icculus/SDL_sound, so repo was not redetermined per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies SDL soundfile decoding; official website and README list supported audio formats and describe it as an SDL add-on.
